channel.title: Nike on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Nike on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Working at Nike as a Store Associate: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A complete guide to working as a Nike store associate, covering pay, employee discounts, daily duties, and what real employees say about the experience.

item.title: Working at Nike as a Cashier: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about the Nike cashier role, from hourly pay and employee discounts to daily duties and real worker experiences.
